facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. ANBA COFFEE on 131 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo hits different when you need to slow down mid-trip. 4.6 stars across 1,312 reviews. Not luck. Consistency. Order something cold, find a seat, and stop planning for an hour. Phu Quoc will still be there. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the crowd disappear the second you walk into ANBA COFFEE. 1,312 people rated it 4.6 stars for a reason. Cold drink in hand, zero rush. This is what a real coffee stop in Phu Quoc looks like.
